name: Accessibility Auditor
description: Reviews React/HTML source for WCAG 2.1 accessibility violations and common a11y anti-patterns

checks.fail: ❌ No src/ directory — cannot perform accessibility audit

checks.pass: ✅ No elements missing alt attribute detected
checks.fail: 🔴 elements may be missing alt attributes
failRecommendations: Add descriptive alt text to all informative images
Use alt="" (empty string) for decorative images

checks.command: grep -rE "onClick[^=]*=[^{]*\{" src --include="*.tsx" --include="*.jsx" -l 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -L "onKeyDown\|onKeyUp\|onKeyPress\|role=" 2>/dev/null | head -10 || true
checks.pass: ✅ Interactive elements appear to have keyboard event handlers
checks.fail: ⚠️  Elements with onClick may lack keyboard equivalents (onKeyDown/role)
failRecommendations: Add onKeyDown handler or use a semantic interactive element (<button>, <a>)
Ensure all click targets are keyboard-reachable

checks.fail: ℹ️  Could not count tabIndex={-1} usages
ℹ️  No ARIA label attributes found in source
⚠️  role="none" / role="presentation" found — verify these are genuinely decorative

checks.prompt:
Perform a WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility review of the React components in the src/ directory.

Focus on:
1. Missing or incorrect alt text on images
2. Form inputs missing associated <label> elements
3. Insufficient colour contrast (flag use of hard-coded low-contrast colours)
4. Keyboard traps or focus management issues
5. Missing ARIA roles on custom interactive widgets
6. Use of `tabIndex` > 0 (anti-pattern)
7. Text content that conveys meaning only through colour

Directory listing:
{content}

Prefix critical WCAG A violations with CRITICAL:, AA violations with WARN:, best-practice notes with INFO:.
